title: Add simple tagging and tag filtering for Saved Scans

requirements.summary: Extend SavedScan localStorage persistence to include per-scan user-defined tags with backward-compatible loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing saved scans already stored under the current localStorage key load without errors and are treated as having an empty tags list.
Newly saved scans can store tags in the same localStorage record structure (no new storage mechanism required).
Tags are persisted across reloads and reflected consistently in in-memory state and localStorage.

file_operations.description: Update the SavedScan type to include tags (string[]). Add backward-compatible migration on load (missing tags => []). Add tag mutation helpers (e.g., addTag/removeTag/updateTag/setTags) that update in-memory state and persist to localStorage under the existing STORAGE_KEY.
Wire new tag mutation callbacks from useSavedScans into SavedScansGallery props so tag edits update the single source of truth and persist across reloads.

requirements.summary: Add per-scan tag management controls (create/edit/remove) in the Saved Scans gallery with clear English labels and keyboard-only support.
acceptanceCriteria: Each saved scan item in the gallery has an affordance to manage tags (add/remove/edit) without opening developer tools.
Tag entry supports keyboard-only use (can add a tag, remove a tag, and exit the control).
All new/updated user-facing text related to tagging is in English.

file_operations.description: Add a visible 'Tags' section per saved scan item that lists existing tags and provides controls to add, edit, and remove tags with clear English labels. Ensure keyboard-only support (Enter to add/save, Escape to exit/blur, focusable remove/edit buttons with accessible aria-labels). Use existing shadcn-ui components already used in the gallery (e.g., Button/Card) where appropriate; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create a focused, reusable per-scan tags editor component used by SavedScansGallery. It should handle tag input, inline edit mode, tag removal, and keyboard interactions while delegating persistence via callbacks. Use existing shadcn-ui components already present in the project where appropriate; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Add tag-based filtering/search in Saved Scans gallery to narrow scans by selected tag or entered tag text, with safe empty-state behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: When a filter is applied, only scans whose tags match the selected/entered tag are shown.
Clearing the filter restores the full gallery list.
If there are no saved scans, the existing empty-state UI still renders correctly and does not show broken filter controls.

file_operations.description: Add a simple filter UI above the grid when there are saved scans (e.g., 'Filter by tag' text input and optional quick-pick chips from known tags). Implement client-side filtering of the rendered list based on tag text match, and provide a clear 'Clear filter' action. Ensure the current empty-state branch remains unchanged and does not render filter controls when savedScans.length === 0. Use existing shadcn-ui components already used in the gallery (e.g., Button/Card) where appropriate; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
